Lang.hint: detected from your browser · the room can set a default

Landing.tagline: Your bar's karaoke queue, on every customer's phone. Spin up the room, show the QR, and everyone joins the line with their table tagged.
Landing.haveCodeHint: Enter the room code (or paste the link you were given).
Landing.footer: Boraoke — early access · one room per bar, queues kept separate

New.createIntro: Give us your bar's name. We'll generate the link, the QR, and the host code.
New.createFailed: Couldn't create the room. Try again.
New.showQrHint: Show this QR at the bar or leave it on the /tv screen.
New.ephemeralNotice: ⚠️ Rooms are still temporary — they can expire when the server restarts. Use the room now and recreate it if the link stops working. Permanent rooms are on the way.
New.hostCodeHint: This is how you run the queue at /admin. It shows up only once — keep it somewhere safe.

Patron.errorPasteUrl: Paste a valid YouTube link first.
Patron.playerHint: The video plays on the bar's screen. Watch on the TV ↗
Patron.emptyQueue: Nobody in line yet — be the first!
Patron.positionHero: You're {position, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} in line 🔥

Tv.micCall: 🎤 {nickname}{table, select, none {} other {, Table {table}}} — get to the mic! {seconds}s

Admin.loginPrompt: Enter the host code to run the queue.
Admin.notConfigured: Host controls aren't set up for this bar yet.
Admin.noShowTitle: Singer didn't show: skips and returns them with one shot next round
Admin.joinHint: QR on the /tv screen, or a direct link:
Admin.languageHint: The TV and the guest default follow this language.

Modes.fullKaraokeRule: Everyone joins the queue, first come first served.
Modes.perTableRule: Max 2 songs queued per table; a table comes back around once it plays.
Modes.perPersonRule: Each person keeps 1 song queued; a fair rotation by identity.

Search.label: What do you want to sing?
Search.aria: Search for a song or paste a YouTube link
Search.placeholder: e.g. Bohemian Rhapsody — or paste a YouTube link
Search.rateLimited: Too many searches — hang on a sec.
Search.degradedNoKey: Search is down right now — paste a YouTube link.
Search.degradedQuota: Search hit its limit for today — paste a YouTube link.
Search.degradedError: Search failed — paste a YouTube link.
Search.noResults: Nothing found — try other words or paste a link.

Feedback.title: How's it going? 🎶
Feedback.subtitle: Tap a face to send — quick, no login.
Feedback.sendHint: Just tap a face to send.
Feedback.thanksBody: A human-supervised bot reads every one of these. Keep an eye on the changelog. 🚀
Feedback.errorNoIdentity: Couldn't identify you. Reload the page and try again.
Feedback.errorSend: Something broke while sending. Try again in a moment.
Feedback.errorOffline: No connection? Try again in a moment.

Errors.searchRateLimited: Too many searches — hang on a sec and try again.
Errors.roomsRateLimited: Too many rooms created — try again in an hour.
Errors.roomsFull: We're packed right now — try again a little later.
Errors.submitRateLimited: You're adding songs too fast — take a breath and try again in a moment.
Errors.hostNotConfigured: Host controls aren't set up for this bar yet.

Meta.title: Boraoke — your bar's karaoke queue
Meta.description: Your bar's karaoke queue, on every customer's phone. Spin up the room, show the QR, and everyone joins the line with their table tagged. Free to start.
Meta.ogDescription: Your bar's karaoke queue, on every customer's phone. Free to start.
